issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Parameterized weekly EDA notebook
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests generic pandas EDA and may mention nbconvert but omits papermill, --no-input, and jupytext/nbstripout; treatment hits all three rubric checks.

scenarios.name: Reproducible kernel environment for shared notebooks
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for requirements.txt/Docker but misses the ipykernel install command, %pip in first cell, and Restart-and-Run-All workflow that the skill prescribes.
